mnemonics.title: LINKED LIST PROPERTIES
mnemonics.content: DAMS - Dynamic Allocation, Access is Sequential, Memory efficient, Slow access compared to arrays

mnemonics.title: INSERTION OPERATIONS
mnemonics.content: BEA - Beginning: O(1), End: O(n), After node: O(1) if node is given

mnemonics.title: NODE COMPONENTS
mnemonics.content: DP - Data and Pointer are the two main components of a node

mnemonics.title: REVERSAL ALGORITHM STEPS
mnemonics.content: PCN - Previous, Current, Next pointers used in reversal algorithm

mnemonics.title: WHEN TO USE LINKED LISTS
mnemonics.content: FUID - Frequent insertions/deletions, Unknown size, Insertions at beginning, Dynamic memory needed
